category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison — China export to Kiribati.

title.en: China-to-Kiribati EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入基里巴斯：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入吉里巴斯：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China EV charger documentation against Kiribati MISE / PUB expectations, nascent EV-market conditions, 240/415 V 50 Hz grid conditions, AS/NZS 3112 Type I domestic context, IEC 61851 safety, IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 connector direction, IEC 61000 EMC evidence, coastal atoll salt-mist derating, OCPP interoperability, and China GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 / GB/T 27930 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与基里巴斯MISE / PUB要求、早期电动车市场条件、240/415 V 50 Hz电网条件、AS/NZS 3112 Type I家用插头环境、IEC 61851安全、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口方向、IEC 61000 EMC证据、沿海环礁盐雾降额、OCPP互操作，以及中国GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 / GB/T 27930基线的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與吉里巴斯MISE / PUB要求、早期電動車市場條件、240/415 V 50 Hz電網條件、AS/NZS 3112 Type I家用插頭環境、IEC 61851安全、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口方向、IEC 61000 EMC證據、沿海環礁鹽霧降額、OCPP互操作，以及中國GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 / GB/T 27930基線的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, MISE project specification determination, MISE regulatory approval, PUB connection approval, electrical-installation design, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, charge-point operators, and installers should verify current Kiribati conformity assessment rules, PUB project requirements, IEC standard editions, and installation rules with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、MISE项目规格裁定、MISE监管批准、PUB接入批准、电气安装设计、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、充电点运营商和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核实现行基里巴斯合格评定规则、PUB项目要求、IEC标准版本及安装规则。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、MISE項目規格裁定、MISE監管批准、PUB接入批准、電氣安裝設計、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、充電點運營商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行吉里巴斯合格評定規則、PUB項目要求、IEC標準版本及安裝規則。

answer_first.en: For China-made EV chargers entering Kiribati, the practical gaps are IEC-based safety and EMC evidence, IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 connector hardware for EV charging, recognition that domestic socket infrastructure uses AS/NZS 3112 Type I, PUB project and grid-connection acceptance, and coastal atoll salt-mist / humidity derating. Kiribati uses 240 V single-phase / 415 V three-phase at 50 Hz: the frequency is the same as China, but the nominal voltage differs from China's 220/380 V baseline. The EV market is essentially pre-nascent, so tender or donor-funded project specifications may be more decisive than a mature national EVSE rulebook.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造电动汽车充电桩进入基里巴斯时，实务差距包括IEC体系安全和EMC证据、用于电动车充电的IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口硬件、确认家用插座基础设施采用AS/NZS 3112 Type I、PUB项目及并网验收，以及沿海环礁盐雾/湿热降额。基里巴斯电网为240 V单相 / 415 V三相、50 Hz：频率与中国相同，但标称电压不同于中国220/380 V基线。电动车市场基本处于前起步阶段，因此招标或捐助方资助项目规格可能比成熟国家EVSE规则手册更具决定性。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造電動汽車充電樁進入吉里巴斯時，實務差距包括IEC體系安全和EMC證據、用於電動車充電的IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口硬體、確認家用插座基礎設施採用AS/NZS 3112 Type I、PUB項目及併網驗收，以及沿海環礁鹽霧/濕熱降額。吉里巴斯電網為240 V單相 / 415 V三相、50 Hz：頻率與中國相同，但標稱電壓不同於中國220/380 V基線。電動車市場基本處於前起步階段，因此招標或捐助方資助項目規格可能比成熟國家EVSE規則手冊更具決定性。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, utility, customs authority, electrical-installation authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
